title: Eternal Dragon Egg│永恆的龍蛋
description: The dragon egg item entity is immune to all damage and will not despawn auto.│龍蛋物品實體免疫一切傷害，並且不會自動消失。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
- The dragon egg in its physical form will no longer despawn.│物品實體型態的龍蛋不會自動消失。
- Dragon Egg item entities are immune to all damage.(This feature requires the "[Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components)" mod to be installed in order to function.)│龍蛋物品實體免疫一切傷害。‎（這個功能需要安裝模組"[物品組件](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components)"才能運作）
